1. pretty good edit, i like the colors, but I feel like the format makes it a bit cramped, and the middle renders face is a bit off @xhawkzy 9.35/10 (edited)
2. Like the red color scheme, its really nice imo, not much wrong with it, just doesnt look vibrant enough to break into the 9's for me @NathyF1ve 8.8/10 (edited)

3. Very close, but I really like the newspaper aesthetic and I think it adds so much creativity to the edit, however, the newspaper also has the added effect of making the edit look bland and dull, a crinkly texture on the newspaper wouldve been that element to turn this into a really good edit @Aichi 8.8/10 (edited)
4. Another close edit, I love the red part, but the green pitch and the euros assets adds clutter that I feel was not needed @Nath92 8.7/10 (edited)
5. Like this edit, but I think tottis half looks awkward, the color scheme is also a bit boring, with it being primarily focused on yellow lighting @Aichi 8.6/10 (edited)
1. 9.3/10 @Unknown User i really like the colors scheme and glitch effects, it's pretty nice overall but i do think the card is a bit to small
2. 9.1/10 @ahmad anderson i love the overlays added to the edit, i think it would be a lot better if the triangles weren't added or if they were transperant but overall good edit

3. 9.1/10 @NathyF1ve really close to the second edit but i think the white outline kinda ruined it, it would be better if the outline was less visible. Also neymar's otw flashback card looks a bit weird since the flashback brush isn't really blending with the otw card

4. 8.9/10 @NathyF1ve another amazing edit right here but i think the text description below isn't really neccesary. it would be better if the text was it's player biodata, also the toty logo above looks kinda off but overall i really like it

5. 8.8/10 @chloiz another jude edit which is really close to the one above but i think nath's edit was more hard to make and has more creativity. I don't have much to say here, maybe the stripes overlay could have less opacity but overall its good
1. 9.7/10 @xhawkzy bro made the fs 20 card look good anyways unique layout which made the edit looks even better and amazing lighting aswell

2. 9.3/10 @Unknown User edit looks amazing, but i think the dark part in the right corner tooks a lot of space in the render and could be reduced a bit, overall is amazing but we're not forgetting about prime antony 2008 lil bro (edited)

3. 9.3/10 @Aichi very close to gehor's edit above although i think this edit was a lot more creative but i think the brushes in the corner kinda turned it down but i love the overall edit also the retouches

4. 9/10 @strian i pretty like this edit, don't really have much to say here, maybe it lacks a bit of colours, if more colours were added especially in the right side it would probably be a lot better but overall a great edit

5. 8.9/10 @Nath92 another close edit, what makes me put this behind is the lack of brushes and also the render placement, it wouldve been better if the render was a bit in the middle, so the left side isn't really empty, also the text above looks off and needs more texture. overall amazing and good kitswap (edited)
6. 8.7/10 @㊄ 𝐉𝔹™ looks great, don't have much to say here but i do think the darker part of his face looks kinda off since it doesn't really blend with the background

8. 8.4/10 @Ahmad has potential, but the top half lets it down, the render looks cramped and also his face looks too contrasted, the bottom part looks good tho (edited)
